author: @maj.horace3709
text:
The Ridgeway Banks video, an ABC news report In the 1970’s, also showed a bicycle wheel-type nitinol device. The wheel engine once immersed into a bath of hot water then falling into a cold bath spun immediately and with quite a force. The video later reports the nitinol was acting with more force as it continued and increasing speed. 

When I saw this, as it was broadcast during the Arab Oil Embargo, I was struck by the terror this would cause energy producers. This very simple device, configured with magnets or a mechanical connection to a generator, could easily supply plenty of today’s needs (cell phone, LED lighting) whilst scavenging either exhaust vent heat, wood stove, etc. 

The power estimates were not discussed.

replies.author: @maj.horace3709
replies.text: @christopherd.winnan8701 search "Free Energy Nitinol Heat Machines invented in the early 1970"

text: Solar concentrator on one end, water on the other --> near the inlet of a black hose water heater? 🤷 Just spit-balling. I do realize that the concentration of solar can be used to heat the water, but I'm thinking in terms of scavenging, where the machine is a sum of many approaches instead of one mechanism. 🤔

author: @selfcorrected-Bobby
text: sorry for this. but can you apply for your company to become a visa sponsor and take me on as an apprentice. i will repay the majority of my salary to you, as long as you can train me in an apprenticeship type role. I have a place  to stay in Weybridge, Surrey, and wish to work with you. I would only use the money to commute to your workshop, and return the remainder to you as tuition for working for you.. But I am stuck in South Africa with no hope of a future. It is not that hard for companies to gain visa sponsorship status, I know of a law firm that does just this. With your presence I will quickly grasp the principles you convey and gain practical knowledge which was withheld from me at a school of rugby playing thugs. Perhaps you should consider creating a vocational school with a visa sponsorship program, as there are skills shortage in UK. I hope you may help me as I'm desperately  hopeless with no hopes here any longer, doddy drive, animal magnetism or no. I need practical apprenticeship and am  lost in a world of ideas the more basic of which I cannot implement as I do not even have a few neodymium magnets to afford making them. Please can you help me leave South Africa, my email is in my channel description.
